failures.explanation: afb1 KO: AFB1 mapped to TIR1 composite gm=0.997. No propagation (ratio=0.996). AFB1 is biologically anti-correlated with other AFBs (Prigge 2020): single afb1 has slight LR-INCREASE while others decrease. The composite collapse cannot represent this.
afb2 KO: TIR1 composite single-paralog gm=0.997 too weak. afb2 is part of the dominant LR receptor trio; single KO is phenotypic.
failures.fix_strategy: Tighten gm (e.g., 0.7) for AFB2 single KO.

failures.explanation: lbd16 KO: LBD composite gm=0.997 too weak. LBD16 is the master LR-initiator TF (Okushima 2007); single KO is strongly phenotypic.
failures.fix_strategy: Tighten LBD composite gm to 0.5 for LBD16/18/29 single KOs.

failures.explanation: lbd18 KO: same as T015. LBD18 with LBD16/29 form the LR-initiation triad.
lbd29 KO: same as T015/T019.
pin2 KO: PIN composite gm=0.997 too weak. pin2 alone is strongly defective in LR/gravitropism.
failures.fix_strategy: Tighten PIN composite gm to 0.5 for pin2.

failures.explanation: pin3 KO: PIN composite gm=0.997 too weak. pin3 alone has measurable LR effect.
failures.fix_strategy: Tighten PIN composite gm to 0.7 for pin3.

failures.explanation: pin3 pin7 double: gm=0.9 too weak; double is more defective than either alone.
failures.fix_strategy: Tighten PIN composite gm to 0.5 for double.

failures.explanation: pin8 KO: gm=0.997 too weak. PIN8 is one of multiple PINs but contributes to LR auxin transport.
afb3 KO: TIR1 composite gm=0.997 too weak. AFB3 is the strongest single contributor to root auxin perception (Parry 2009).

pyl8 KO: expected=decreased predicted=increased ratio=3.16. PYL8 has a non-canonical positive role on LR via ARF7/19 sensitisation (Zhao 2014). Network only models ABA→ABI4_5⊣LR (ABA-inhibitory arm), missing the PYL8→ARF7/19 sensitisation arm.
failures.fix_strategy: Add edge PYL8 -> ARF7 (+1) per Zhao 2014 (DOI: 10.1038/nature13593).

failures.explanation: max4 KO single: expected=unchanged predicted=increased ratio=4.64. MAX4 is one of three SL-biosynthesis enzymes; current network treats them as INDEPENDENT activators (geomean), so single KO collapses Strigolactone signal. In biology, single max4 has redundant compensation.
failures.fix_strategy: Encode max4/max1 single KO as gm=0.5 (not 0.0) to preserve partial SL biosynthesis.

failures.explanation: max1 KO single: same pattern as T065.

phyB KO: expected=decreased predicted=increased ratio=1.73. Network's PHYB→HY5→ARF19(+) chain produces the wrong direction for LR. In biology, phyB negatively regulates LR via shoot-to-root HY5 mobile signal (Chen 2016). Direction needs structural fix.
failures.fix_strategy: Requires structural change (re-route PHYB→LR cascade or add HY5⊣LR direct inhibition); deferred.

failures.explanation: phyA KO: mapped to PHYB family. Same direction issue as T069.
pin3 single replicate: same as T028.

10 mM KNO3 high-N: expected=decreased predicted=increased ratio=4.05. Network has Low_Nitrate→CLE+→CLV1+→inhibit LR (correct for low-N feedback). Setting Low_Nitrate=0 removes inhibition, predicting MORE LR. But high-N also inhibits LR via OTHER feedbacks not modelled.
failures.fix_strategy: Requires adding a high-N inhibition arm (e.g., glutamate/CEPs). Deferred — biological complexity beyond network scope.

failures.explanation: Far-Red environmental: same direction issue as T069 (PHYB-cascade LR direction wrong).
iaa28-1 + NAA: stabilised IAA28 cannot be degraded by auxin. Per §Trap 5, expected should be unchanged vs mutant baseline. Currently baseline=WT, expected=decreased.
failures.fix_strategy: Recode T096 baseline WT->mutant, expected decreased->unchanged.

failures.explanation: slr-1 (IAA14 stabilised) + NAA: same Trap-5 pattern as T096.

arf7 arf19 + ARF7-GR + Dex rescue: encoded baseline=mutant but no exogenous supply, so mutant_baseline equals perturbed -> ratio=1.0. Should be baseline=WT for this rescue (Dex induces ARF7-GR transgene, comparing to WT not mutant).
failures.fix_strategy: Switch baseline from mutant to WT for T100/T101/T102.

failures.explanation: arf7 arf19 + LBD16 OE rescue: same baseline issue as T100.
plt3 plt5 plt7 + PLT1 OE rescue: same baseline issue as T100.
T101A NRT1.1 phospho-mimic: borderline ratio (0.964). Mechanism encoding (CHL1 gm=2.0) marginal.
T101D NRT1.1 phospho-dead: borderline ratio (1.037). Same as T115.
max2 + GR24 (Trap 5): RWR fails because signed-graph propagation cannot enforce perception-gate (algebraic/ODE pass).
d14 + GR24 (Trap 5): same as T122.
cle3 + low-N: encoded Low_Nitrate exo=1.0 dominates -> CLE up -> CLV1 up -> less LR. Single cle3 KO (gm=0.997 in CLE composite) doesn't rescue. Expected=increased per Araya 2014.
failures.fix_strategy: Tighten CLE composite gm to 0.7 for cle3 single, OR reduce Low_Nitrate exogenous strength.

failures.explanation: clv1 + low-N: RWR-only failure.
EBR + mild low-N: Low_Nitrate exo=1.0 forces CLE up, dominates BR effect. Predicted=decreased; expected=increased.
failures.fix_strategy: Low_Nitrate node semantics make combined treatments hard to model. Deferred.

failures.explanation: abi5 + high-N: ODE-only failure. Edge case.
Low_Nitrate environmental systemic: ODE borderline.
